subject: Relion CTF
body:
Hi all,

I am recently working with warp. I am pretty new to it.

I was wondering something about the CTF obtained from the "reconstruct 
sub-particles."

The CTF volume obtained has a dimension of:

Number of columns, rows, sections 41      80      80

Instead, the images have these dimensions:

Number of columns, rows, sections 80      80      80


I am attaching a screenshot of the volume opened with chimera. 

Is this data the usual one? If not, what could be the problem.

Thanks all,

Jonathan
